sections.heading: Get in touch
sections.content: Our customer service team is available 7 days a week. You can reach us by phone, email, or live chat. We aim to respond to all enquiries within 24 hours.

sections.heading: Phone support
sections.content: Call us on 0344 561 1234. Our lines are open Monday to Friday 8am-8pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, and Sunday 10am-4pm.

sections.heading: Live chat
sections.content: Chat with one of our agents online for quick answers to your questions. Available Monday to Saturday 8am-8pm and Sunday 10am-4pm.

sections.heading: Email
sections.content: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Please include your order number if your query relates to an existing order.
